data.name: Light-Space Love: New Horizons
data.detailed_description:
Play as Captain Linessa Star on her diplomatic journey through the cosmos, exploring uncharted territory in order to build alliances with other uncontacted Xeno civilizations on behalf of the love-spreading SpermFleet Federation.

Lead your crew in this erotic story-driven spaceship management rogue-lite as you explore the border sectors between the Federation's territory and the many mysterious, and even hostile uncharted territories that exist at the edge of the galaxy.

In Light-Space Love: New Horizons, you will face many obstacles that will challenge the Federation's Grand Initiative, which is the mission of spreading the message of Love by supporting the existence, protection and especially the reproduction of Xenos throughout the galaxy.

Gameplay Overview

What will you do when faced with a hostile ship that is intent on making it clear that the Federation's presence is not welcome here? Will you fight fire with fire or will you take a more diplomatic approach to convince your opponent's to lay down their arms? Or perhaps convince them to lay down with you instead?

Gameplay Features

Exploration - Explore sub-sectors within each sector of the border territories. Each sector that you visit has its own unique encounters and themes based around the alien faction's leader.

Unique Storylines & Characters - Meet unique characters along your journey, learn the stories of the leaders and the inhabitants of each sector you visit. Learn about their strange and erotic traditions as you form alliances between them and SpermFleet Federation.

Lead As You See Fit - Check in with your crew as you explore the cosmos and lead them in strange, dangerous and lewd encounters, commanding them to manage your ship's systems, to board enemy ships and to respond to various requests and strange situations at each waypoint you jump to.

Roguelite Progression - Every time you fail to uphold a positive reputation for the Federation, you must start over from the beginning in order to prove yourself to the various faction leaders and inhabitants within the border territories and to gain their trust, with each play-through being different from the last.

data.short_description: A sexy space exploration adventure where you play as the Captain of your own spaceship, where you command your crew through a galaxy filled with erotic and intense encounters!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.8 GHz Dual Core or Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics or GPU with 512MB VRAM
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 16:9 Resolution Recommended
